name: tally-desktop
description: Sistema de Tally para ATEM Blackmagic

scripts.sync-version: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = require('./package.json'); const content = 'module.exports = { VERSION: \'' + pkg.version + '\' };'; fs.writeFileSync('./frontend/src/version.js', content); console.log('✅ version.js sincronizado: v' + pkg.version);"
scripts.build-front: npm run sync-version && cd frontend && npm run build
scripts.release: npm run clean && npm run build-front && npm run build-app
scripts.postrelease: echo ✅ Build finalizado com sucesso! Verifique a pasta /dist
